stemHtml: An operator is introducing a new aircraft variant that is a common type with its existing fleet but a different variant. What must a pilot do to operate both?

options.a: Complete differences training including theoretical and practical elements.
options.b: Complete familiarisation training with theoretical knowledge only.
options.c: Complete a full type rating and skill test on the new variant.
options.d: No additional training is required since both are the same type.
